name: Ancient Gear Hunting Hound
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械猟犬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアハウンドドッグ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: Inflict 600 damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Ancient Gear" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Materials.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Inflict 600 damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Ancient Gear" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Materials.
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Inflict 600 damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 "Ancient Gear" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Materials.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
